creator: hfwirth@ping.at
text:
I added the MMX instructions to gas and gdb and tested
	the changes. I hope you will find this useful and will incorporate
	it to FreeBSD.

Fix: Appended to this please find an uuencoded, gzipped tar file
	containing the following files:

		as.mmx.diff	...	patch for (g)as
		gdb.mmx.diff	...	patch for gdb
		how_to_patch	...	Install instructions
		mmx_changes.doc	...	Short documention, what I did
		mmxtest.c	...	The test program I used
		mmxtest.result	...	The results from the test program

	If you have any question, please feel free to email me!

	Regards
	Helmut
